questions.q: When updating an attendance policy, what's the first thing you should review?
options: Current labor laws and statutory requirements

questions.q: An HR policy document should primarily be written for?
options: All employees — clear, simple, and actionable

questions.q: What's essential when rolling out a new WFH policy?
options: Announce via email and move on
Communicate clearly, train managers, collect feedback, and iterate
Let managers decide on their own

questions.q: Which document is legally required to be maintained for every employee in India?
How often should HR policies be reviewed?
options: Only when there's a legal issue
At least annually or when regulations change
